suggestions: Add explicit examples of budgeting or forecasting work to align with typical Finance Expert responsibilities.
Include finance‑specific certifications (e.g., CPA, CFA) or mention relevant coursework to strengthen credibility.
Quantify additional cost‑saving or efficiency gains beyond the current metrics to showcase impact.
Highlight stakeholder‑management and cross‑functional communication experience, especially for remote teams.
Incorporate industry‑specific finance terminology (e.g., GAAP, IFRS, financial close) to match recruiter expectations.
